issues.description: Condition is 'Always' but card text requires 'If your opponent has 2 or more Characters with a base power of 5000 or more'. This should be a custom condition checking opponent's board state, not Always.
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is correct, but the DSL lacks the Blocker ability entirely. The card has two separate effects: [Blocker] and [On Play]. Only the On Play effect is currently in DSL.

condition.description: Opponent has 2 or more Characters with base power 5000 or more
